title: Use Bar Graphs
essential_question: How can you read and interpret data in a bar graph?
strategies: Read the scale to find the value of each gridline
Read where the bar ends to find the value

vertical_alignment.prerequisite: G2 — Organize data in up to 4 categories; use tally marks
vertical_alignment.current: G3 — Read scaled bar graphs; solve 'how many more/fewer' and two-step problems
vertical_alignment.successor: G4 — Multi-step problems using data in various representations

unit_intro_message: 이번 단원에서는 막대 그래프를 읽고 해석하는 방법을 배웁니다. 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점에서 값 읽기, '더 많은/적은' 비교, 2단계 문제 풀기를 익힙니다.
unit_close_message: 잘 했어요! 이제 막대 그래프를 읽고 비교 문제를 풀 수 있습니다. 다음 레슨에서는 막대 그래프를 직접 만드는 방법을 학습합니다.

pretest.question: A bar graph has a scale of 0, 2, 4, 6, 8. The bar for 'Soccer' ends at 6. How many students chose Soccer?
pretest.explanation: The bar ends at 6, so 6 students.

expected_errors.description: 스케일 값(6)을 그대로 읽지 않고 6÷2=3으로 계산
expected_errors.citation: Friel et al. (2001) p.130 — 스케일 오독

expected_errors.note: 6 대신 다음 눈금인 8을 읽음

pretest.math_note: The bar ends at 6, so 6 students.

learn.title: What is a Bar Graph?
learn.content: A bar graph uses bars to show data. The length or height of each bar shows the value. One axis shows categories, the other shows numbers (the scale).

expected_errors.note: 단순 계산 실수

learn.title: Reading the Scale
learn.content: The scale is the set of numbers along one axis. It can count by 1s, 2s, 5s, 10s, etc. To read a bar's value, look at where the bar ends and match it to the scale.

expected_errors.note: 단순 계산 실수

learn.title: Comparing Bars
learn.content: The tallest (or longest) bar represents the most. The shortest bar represents the least. To find 'how many more' or 'how many fewer,' subtract the two values.

expected_errors.note: 단순 계산 실수

learn.title: Guided Example — Reading a Bar Graph
learn.content: Bar graph: Cats 8, Dogs 12, Fish 4, Birds 6. Step 1: Find the category the question asks about. → Fish Step 2: Look at where the Fish bar ends. → It ends at 4. Step 3: Read the scale. → Each gridline = 2. The bar ends on the gridline marked 4. Answer: 4 students chose Fish. Tip: Place your finger on the bar and slide it straight to the scale axis.

learn.title: Reading Values Between Gridlines
learn.content: When a bar ends exactly halfway between two gridlines, the value is the average of those two gridlines. Example: Scale counts by 2s (0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10). A bar ends halfway between 8 and 10. Halfway = (8 + 10) ÷ 2 = 9. So the bar shows 9. Rule: Halfway between two scale marks = smaller + (scale interval ÷ 2).

learn.title: Comparing Bars — How Many More or Fewer?
learn.content: To find 'how many more' or 'how many fewer': SUBTRACT the two bar values. Example: Soccer 14, Basketball 8. 'How many more chose Soccer than Basketball?' → 14 − 8 = 6. Key: 'More than' or 'fewer than' → SUBTRACT (never add). Step 1: Read the value of each bar. Step 2: Subtract smaller from larger. Step 3: Check: does your answer make sense?

learn.title: Math Talk: Two-Step Bar Graph Problems
learn.content: Bar graph: Mon 8, Tue 6, Wed 10, Thu 4. Total = 8+6+10+4 = 28. Problem: 'How many students did NOT choose Monday?' Wrong approach: Answer = 28 (stopping at the total). Correct approach: Step 1 → find total = 28. Step 2 → subtract Monday: 28 − 8 = 20. Always re-read the question after Step 1 to confirm whether one more step is needed.
learn.math_talk_prompt: Mon(8), Tue(6), Wed(10), Thu(4) 막대 그래프에서 'Monday를 선택하지 않은 학생 수'를 구할 때 왜 총합(28)만 구하면 안 될까요? 두 번째 단계(빼기)가 왜 필요한지 설명해보세요. 어떤 문제는 총합이 답이고 어떤 문제는 총합에서 한 카테고리를 빼야 할까요?
learn.math_note: 2단계: ①총합=28, ②NOT Monday=28-8=20. 문제 재읽기 필수.

learn.title: Lesson Summary: Use Bar Graphs
learn.content: In this lesson you learned how to: ① Read bar values: find where the bar ends on the scale axis. ② Read between gridlines: halfway between two marks = smaller + (interval ÷ 2). ③ Find most/least: the tallest bar = most; shortest bar = least. ④ Compare bars: 'how many more/fewer' → SUBTRACT the two values. ⑤ Solve two-step problems: Step 1 find the needed value(s), Step 2 apply the final operation.
learn.lesson_summary: 막대 그래프 마스터: ①바 끝점 = 값 ②중간값 = 작은 눈금 + 간격÷2 ③최다=가장 높은 바, 최소=가장 낮은 바 ④비교='더 많은/적은'→빼기 ⑤2단계 문제: 1단계 값 구하기 → 문제 재읽기 → 2단계 연산
learn.math_note: 핵심: 바 끝점 읽기 + 중간값 + 비교(빼기) + 2단계 문제.

try.question: A bar graph has a scale counting by 2s: 0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10. The bar for 'Grapes' ends exactly halfway between 8 and 10. How many students chose Grapes?
try.explanation: The bar is halfway between 8 and 10. Halfway = (8+10)÷2 = 9.
solution_steps: Identify the two gridlines the bar is between: 8 and 10.
hints: Look at the two gridlines the bar is between.
Halfway between two numbers = add them and divide by 2.

feedback.incorrect: The bar is halfway between 8 and 10. (8+10)÷2=9.

expected_errors.description: 중간값(9) 읽지 않고 아래 눈금(8) 제출 — 중간 스케일 오독
expected_errors.citation: Friel et al. (2001) p.130 — 막대 끝점 오독

expected_errors.note: 위 눈금(10) 읽음 — 중간값을 위쪽으로 올림

try.question: Bar graph: Walk 5, Bus 8, Car 3, Bike 4. How many students did NOT come to school by Bus?
hints: First add all bar values to find the total.
Then subtract the Bus value from the total.

feedback.incorrect: Step 1: add all values (5+8+3+4=20). Step 2: subtract Bus (20−8=12).

expected_errors.description: 총합(20)만 구하고 Bus(8) 빼기 단계 누락 — 중간 결과 제출
expected_errors.citation: EngageNY G3 M6 — 중간 단계에서 멈춤

expected_errors.note: Bus 값(8) 그대로 제출 — 'NOT Bus' 의미 미파악

try.math_note: 총합=20, NOT Bus=20-8=12 ✓. 오답 D(20): 총합에서 멈춤.

hints: Think about what use bar graphs means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how use bar graphs works.

expected_errors.citation: Van de Walle et al. (2013) p.391

expected_errors.note: Apples(10) 행 읽음 — 가장 큰 값 선택

practice_r1.explanation: Dogs has the highest bar at 14.
hints: Think about what use bar graphs means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is D. Remember how use bar graphs works.

expected_errors.description: Dogs(14) 대신 Cats(10) 선택 — 목록 두 번째 항목 선택 (체계적 스캔 부재)
expected_errors.citation: Van de Walle et al. (2013) p.391

expected_errors.note: Birds(4) 선택 — 가장 작은 값과 가장 큰 값 혼동

practice_r1.math_note: Dogs has the highest bar at 14.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is C. Remember how use bar graphs works.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is C. Remember how use bar graphs works.

practice_r1.question: A bar graph has a scale counting by 2s: 0, 2, 4, 6, 8. The bar for 'Soccer' ends halfway between 4 and 6. How many students chose Soccer?
hints: Identify the two gridlines the bar is between: 4 and 6.
Halfway = (4+6)÷2.

feedback.incorrect: The bar is halfway between 4 and 6. Add them and divide by 2: (4+6)÷2=5.

expected_errors.description: 중간값(5) 읽지 않고 아래 눈금(4) 제출
expected_errors.citation: Friel et al. (2001) p.130 — 스케일 중간값 오독

expected_errors.note: 위 눈금(6) 읽음 — 중간값을 올림

practice_r1.math_note: (4+6)÷2=5 ✓ 중간값. 오답 A(4): 아래 눈금, C(6): 위 눈금.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r1.question: Bar graph: Strawberry 9, Vanilla 5, Chocolate 12, Mint 6. How many fewer students chose Vanilla than Chocolate?
hints: Find the value for Vanilla and Chocolate.
Subtract: larger − smaller.

feedback.incorrect: 'Fewer than' means subtract. Chocolate(12)−Vanilla(5)=7.

expected_errors.description: '더 적은' 질문에 12+5=17 덧셈 수행 — 비교 언어 오해
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.9 — 비교 언어 오오해

expected_errors.note: Chocolate 값(12) 그대로 제출 — 차이 계산 누락 (M05)

practice_r1.math_note: Chocolate(12) - Vanilla(5) = 7 ✓. 오답 D(17): 12+5=17 덧셈 오류.

concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r1.question: Bar graph: Reading 8, Drawing 12, Dancing 6, Cooking 10. How many students did NOT choose the most popular activity?
practice_r1.explanation: Most popular = Drawing (12). NOT Drawing = Reading+Dancing+Cooking = 8+6+10 = 24.
solution_steps: Step 1: Most popular = Drawing (12, tallest bar).
hints: First find the most popular activity (tallest bar).
Then add all other activities' values.

feedback.correct: Excellent! Drawing is most popular (12). NOT Drawing = 8+6+10 = 24.
feedback.incorrect: Step 1: most popular = Drawing (12). Step 2: add the rest: 8+6+10=24.

expected_errors.description: 가장 인기 있는 Drawing(12)만 구하고 나머지 합산 단계 누락 — 12 제출
expected_errors.citation: EngageNY G3 Module 6 — 중간 단계에서 멈춤

expected_errors.note: 모든 카테고리 합산 8+12+6+10=36 (Drawing 포함) — M04

practice_r1.math_note: Drawing=12 (최다). NOT Drawing=8+6+10=24 ✓. 오답 A(12): 중간 단계 멈춤.

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r1.feedback_correct: Excellent! Drawing is most popular (12). NOT Drawing = 8+6+10 = 24.

practice_r2.question: Bar graph: Cats 9, Dogs 15, Fish 6, Rabbits 12. How many animals in total does the graph show?
solution_steps: Read each bar: Cats=9, Dogs=15, Fish=6, Rabbits=12.
hints: Read all four bar values carefully.
Add all four values together.

feedback.incorrect: Read all four bars and add: 9+15+6+12=42.

expected_errors.description: Cats+Dogs+Fish만 합산: 9+15+6=30 또는 일부 누락 — Rabbits 포함 안 함
expected_errors.citation: Friel et al. (2001) p.131 — 카테고리 누락

expected_errors.note: Rabbits 값(12)만 제출 — 최댓값 선택

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

assessment_source.description: 3.MD.B.3 평가 지침 — 막대 그래프 해석 및 비교 문제

practice_r2.question: Bar graph: Red 16, Blue 10, Green 8, Yellow 4. How many more students chose Red than Yellow?
hints: Read Red and Yellow bar values.
Subtract: larger − smaller.

feedback.incorrect: 'More than' means subtract. Red(16)−Yellow(4)=12.

expected_errors.description: '더 많은' 질문에 16+4=20 덧셈 수행 — 비교 언어 오해
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.9

expected_errors.note: 잘못된 카테고리 비교: Blue-Green=10-8=2 또는 다른 쌍 계산

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r2.question: Bar graph: Morning 20, Afternoon 14, Evening 8, Night 6. How many students exercised in the Morning or Afternoon?
hints: Only read Morning and Afternoon bars.
Add those two values.

feedback.incorrect: Only add Morning(20) and Afternoon(14): 20+14=34. Don't include Evening or Night.

expected_errors.description: Morning+Afternoon만 구하는 것이 아닌 4개 전체 합산: 20+14+8+6=48
expected_errors.citation: Friel et al. (2001) p.131 — 불필요한 카테고리 포함

expected_errors.note: Morning(20)만 제출 — Afternoon 합산 누락 (M04)

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r2.question: A tally table shows: Sunny = 𝍸𝍸𝍸 (15), Cloudy = 𝍸𝍸 (10), Rainy = 𝍸| (6). You make a bar graph from this data. Where does the bar for Cloudy end?
practice_r2.explanation: Cloudy tally: 𝍸𝍸 = 5+5 = 10 days. The bar ends at 10.
hints: Each 𝍸 = 5. Count only the Cloudy row.

feedback.correct: Correct! 𝍸𝍸=10, so the bar ends at 10.
feedback.incorrect: Read the Cloudy tally: 𝍸𝍸 = 5+5 = 10.

expected_errors.description: Cloudy 대신 Sunny(𝍸𝍸𝍸=15) 행 읽음 — 탈리 표에서 잘못된 행 추적
expected_errors.citation: Van de Walle et al. (2013) p.391

expected_errors.note: 탈리 그룹 수(2)만 세어 2 제출 — 각 그룹=5 무시 (M01)

practice_r2.math_note: Cloudy: 𝍸𝍸=10 ✓. 오답 C(15): Sunny 행 오독. (U1 연계)

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r2.feedback_correct: Correct! 𝍸𝍸=10, so the bar ends at 10.

practice_r2.question: Tally table: Pizza = 𝍸𝍸𝍸| (16), Burger = 𝍸𝍸 (10), Taco = 𝍸𝍸𝍸 (15). You make a bar graph with this data. How many more students chose Pizza than Burger?
hints: Count each tally: 𝍸=5, |=1.
Subtract: Pizza − Burger.

feedback.incorrect: Read tallies: Pizza=16, Burger=10. Then subtract: 16−10=6.

expected_errors.description: 비교 질문에 Pizza+Burger=16+10=26 덧셈 수행
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.9

expected_errors.note: Pizza 값(16) 그대로 제출 — 차이 계산 누락 (M05)

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r2.question: Tally table: Cats = 𝍸𝍸| (11), Dogs = 𝍸𝍸𝍸 (15), Fish = 𝍸 (5). You make a bar graph from this data. What is the total number of animals recorded?
hints: Count each tally carefully: 𝍸=5, |=1.
Add all three totals.

feedback.incorrect: Count all tallies: Cats=11, Dogs=15, Fish=5. Then add: 11+15+5=31.

expected_errors.description: Fish(𝍸=5) 누락: Cats(11)+Dogs(15)=26만 합산 — 세 번째 카테고리 포함 안 함
expected_errors.citation: Friel et al. (2001) p.131 — 카테고리 누락

expected_errors.note: Dogs 값(15) 그대로 제출 — 최대 탈리 수 카테고리 선택

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs
concept_source.description: 막대 그래프 읽기: 스케일 읽기, 바 끝점 값 읽기, 비교(더 많은/적은), 최대/최소 식별

practice_r3.question: Bar graph: Mon 8, Tue 12, Wed 6, Thu 10, Fri 14. On which day did exactly twice as many books get returned as on Wednesday?
hints: Think about what use bar graphs means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how use bar graphs works.

expected_errors.description: 6×2=12를 찾지 않고 6+6=12 계산 후 목록에서 12 아닌 Thursday(10) 선택
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.10

expected_errors.note: Monday(8) 선택 — 6+2=8으로 '두 배' 대신 '2 더하기' 해석

concept_source.name: Go Math Grade 3 Chapter 2 Lesson 2.4 — Use Bar Graphs

practice_r3.question: Suppose 3 more friends chose mushrooms on a pizza graph where Mushroom currently has 4 votes (scale by 2). Where would the bar for Mushrooms end?
hints: Think about what use bar graphs means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is C. Remember how use bar graphs works.

expected_errors.description: 4+3=7이 아닌 4+4=8 계산 — 추가 수를 잘못 읽음
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.10

expected_errors.note: 4+2=6 계산 — 3 대신 2를 더함

practice_r3.question: Bar graph (scale by 5): Room A = 25, Room B = 15, Room C = 30, Room D = 20. The school goal is 100 cans total. How many more cans are needed?
hints: Think about what use bar graphs means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how use bar graphs works.

expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.10

expected_errors.note: 일부 카테고리만 합산: 25+15+30=70, 100-70=30? 아니면 세 카테고리 포함 오류

practice_r3.question: Bar graph: Art 8, Music 14, Drama 10, Dance 12. Suppose 6 students who originally chose Music decide to switch to Art instead. What will the new value for Art be?
hints: Start with Art's original value.
Add the 6 students who switch.

feedback.incorrect: Art starts at 8. Add 6 more: 8+6=14.

expected_errors.description: Art 원래 값(8) 그대로 제출 — 6명 전환 반영 누락
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.10

expected_errors.note: Music(14)+Art(8)=22 제출 — 두 카테고리를 더함

practice_r3.math_note: Art(8)+6=14 ✓. 오답 A(8): 원래 값 그대로.

practice_r3.question: Bar graph: Spring 15, Summer 25, Fall 10, Winter 20. Is the total for Spring and Winter equal to, greater than, or less than the total for Summer and Fall?
choices: D. Cannot determine without more information
hints: Calculate Spring+Winter first.
Calculate Summer+Fall and compare.

feedback.incorrect: Spring+Winter=15+20=35. Summer+Fall=25+10=35. They are equal.

expected_errors.description: Spring+Winter=35, Summer+Fall=35 같음을 계산하지 않고 Spring값(25) 보고 Summer그룹 더 크다고 오판
expected_errors.citation: NCTM MD Progressions K-5 (2011) p.10

expected_errors.note: Summer+Fall=25+10=35 오계산 — Summer 값이 크다고 그룹 합도 더 크다고 가정

practice_r3.math_note: Spring+Winter=35=Summer+Fall ✓. 합산 전 단일 값으로 비교하면 오류.
